product_results.title: ESR for iPhone 16 Pro Case with MagSafe, Supports Magnetic Charging, Smooth & Slim Silicone Case, Shockproof, Full Screen and Camera Protection, Soft Microfiber Lining, Cloud Series, Black

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone case to be of top quality and describe it as a very good case. The case fits phones great and seems sturdy. Users appreciate its great look and note that it provides great protection for phones. The case also offers good grip and magnetic strength. However, some customers are disappointed with discoloration issues.

authors_reviews.title: Our family has used these ESR cases for years. The best available iPhone clear cases on the market.
authors_reviews.text: Disclosure. Having purchased many ESR products, ESR did invite me to do a review of this product. ESR knows I have not hesitated to return other products, and harshly criticize anything that I consider to be a flaw in thoughtful design or quality. So this is actually a brave invitation on their part.I had to say the above, because I sound like an unabashed fan-boy in this review. I do not have a single negative thing to say about these ESR clear cases.Our family has been using them for years on our iPhone 13 and 13 Pro Max.These ESR cases provide equal or better fit, grip, protection, magnetic force, and slim, light, feel compared to their Apple equivalents.The only very minor downside vs the Apple equivalent, is the ESR case does VERY SLIGHTLY yellow over the years. You won’t even notice it unless you go looking for it. At less than 1/3 the price, even if you are super picky, the ESR case is still a much better deal. You can also fall back on ESR’s amazing customer service. Just try that with an official Apple case months after purchase and you will see which company provides superior customer service. The Apple case does suffer major drawbacks from the fact that it stays so clear over time. The Apple case is harder, shinier, and most importantly, it’s more slippery than the iPhone itself.The Apple case makes it harder to keep a confident grip on your iPhone. The ESR case makes it easier to keep a confident grip on your phone.My wife is very pleased with this ESR case. In fact in terms of aesthetics, in our opinion, this is the best looking clear case / iPhone combo yet. The new “flat” as opposed to “shiny” color on the iPhone 15, goes especially well with this ESR clear case. The ESR clear case is less “shiny” than the genuine Apple clear clase and therefore in our opinion looks better on the iPhone 15 than does the official Apple clear case.ESR has become my “go to” brand as they strive for quality in their products, and provide exemplary customer service after the sale.Buy this case. It is a no brainer. ESR will ensure you are happy or give you your money back. They always reply quickly to customer service inquiries. They provide among the most reliable customer service on Amazon. In fact, I would say ESR’s customer service is better than Apple’s customer service, and that is really saying something.Wow I really sound like a fan boy. Just to back that up, I was not personally satisfied, by the ESR magsafe/find my compatible wallet/stand, nor the ESR foldable MagSafe travel charger. YMMV. Many people love those products. ESR worked with me in a timely manner, and when I could not be satisfied, ensured that I got 100% of my money back. Even on a product I purchased from them on Kickstarter !If you are not yet a fan of ESR try them. They truly will ensure you are happy or give you your money back.
authors_reviews.author: Dave in Toronto

authors_reviews.title: Great Quality, Looks, Feel and Price.
authors_reviews.text: Bought this "ESR for iPhone 15 Cloud Series Case with MagSafe" for my (new to me) iPhone 15.After I had bought a ESR Combo case / keyboard for my iPad Pro I was Sold on the Great Quality ESR provides.The iPhone case is a Perfect fit and is just what I wanted for my iPhone.The feel is secure non slip with a nice soft silky touch. It's not bulky and protects the front and back plus the camera lens. I also bought the ESR camera lens protection that prevents scratches. The Magsafe charging works great. Looking to get another as I like to change it up now and then.Highly Recommend ESR Products.
authors_reviews.author: D. Mc

authors_reviews.title: Clear, Strong & MagSafe-Perfect 📱✨
authors_reviews.text: This ESR clear case fits my iPhone 17 Pro Max perfectly and feels very solid. The MagSafe magnets are strong, camera protection is well thought out, and the case keeps the phone looking clean and premium. Great grip with military-grade protection without adding bulk 👍🧲💪
authors_reviews.author: K.S.

authors_reviews.title: Very good but can be improved
authors_reviews.text: Good quality caseGood -Fits wellGood protectionMatt finish feels good to touch and edges are grippyConsThe Matt finish at back is oil/stain magnet so just touching makes it smudgy and not easy to clean.The camera protection edge could be higher. Got a scratch on lens when phone fell and had to get back replaced.Looking for these upgrades in futureKick stand and camera button, esr has case with all features but doesn't have green color
authors_reviews.author: Amrit

authors_reviews.title: Great Clear Case and Excellent Customer Support
authors_reviews.text: I really like the ESR Classic Hybrid HaloLock clear case. The design looks very clean and the clarity of the back panel is excellent, which makes the phone look premium while still protecting it. The magnets also feel strong and the case fits the phone well.However, the first case I received from Amazon appeared to have scratches. It seems like it may have been a returned item that should not have been resold. That part was disappointing.That said, ESR customer support responded quickly and professionally. They issued a full refund and also offered to send a replacement to regain my trust, which I really appreciate.Overall, the case itself is great and the customer service experience was very positive. I’m looking forward to trying the replacement.
authors_reviews.author: LOU ANTHONY NANIONG

authors_reviews.title: Excellent quality and perfect fit
authors_reviews.text: This case is excellent. The fit on the iPhone 17 Pro Max is perfect, the buttons are responsive, and the MagSafe works flawlessly. The case feels premium, offers good protection, and still looks sleek and clear.No issues at all so far — very happy with the quality. Definitely a great value and highly recommended.
authors_reviews.author: Kindle Customer

authors_reviews.title: Protect your cell phone
authors_reviews.text: One of the best quality and perfect fit cases. Outstandingly quality feel. Matte feel so oils and grease rarely show. Buttons on both sides respond great. Cut out for the microphone, speaker and charging port are excellent spaced. MagSafe back is awesome for wireless charging. Feels great in hand. Raised edges around screen and camera for better protection. I’ve dropped my phone a hand full of times and did not damage the phone. The scuffs from the drops are less of my worries. It’s one still the best brand cases protectors out there!
authors_reviews.author: ReviewGuy

authors_reviews.title: Solid case for affordable price
authors_reviews.text: I had this case for over a year and bought it again. It’s value for money, lasts a good time, and also comes with a screen protector and camera guards. Like other clear cases, yellowing is inevitable and this case goes through the same and that’s the only reason for changing it. Overall, nice case
authors_reviews.author: Very average perfume
